name: 3DPrint-Filament-RFID-Tool
desc: A unified tool for 3D printing filament management with RFID read/write support, compatible with multiple brands (Bambu, Creality, Snapmaker, and more).
descFull: A unified tool for 3D printing filament management with RFID read/write support, compatible with multiple brands (Bambu, Creality, Snapmaker, and more).
